body:
🔴 **Design Issue** — `AzureSupportedClouds` uses a closed template-literal union instead of `string`

```ts
export type AzureSupportedClouds = `${AzureClouds}`;
```

This is a closed union type that restricts callers to exactly the values in the `AzureClouds` enum. When Azure adds a new cloud environment in the service, existing client code would fail to compile. The standard Azure SDK pattern for extensible string enums is:

```ts
export type AzureSupportedClouds = string;
```

paired with a `KnownAzureSupportedClouds` (or `KnownAzureClouds`) enum so callers can use the known values as constants while still accepting forward-compatible arbitrary strings.

**Fix:** Change the type to `string` and file a bug in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Tool Issue** — `autoPublish: false` for a stable release

`"autoPublish": false` was previously `true` in this package. This is a stable release (`20.0.0`), so `autoPublish` must be `true` to enable automatic NPM publishing after the PR merges.

**Fix:** Change `"autoPublish": false` → `"autoPublish": true`, and report the generation tooling bug at the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Design Issue** — `AzureClouds` enum is missing the `Known*` prefix

All extensible string enums in this package follow the `KnownXxx` naming convention (e.g., `KnownActivityState`, `KnownCreatedByType`). The `AzureClouds` enum breaks this pattern — it should be named `KnownAzureClouds`.

Additionally, enum members use `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (`AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD`, `AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD`, `AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT`) while the Azure SDK guidelines require `PascalCase` for enum members (e.g., `AzureChinaCloud`, `AzurePublicCloud`, `AzureUsGovernment`).

**Fix:** Rename the enum to `KnownAzureClouds` and use PascalCase member names. File a bug in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

3 issues found in this PR for `@azure/arm-datafactory` v20.0.0 (stable): 1 tool issue and 2 API design issues.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37655,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/datafactory/arm-datafactory/package.json","line":9,"issueType":"tool","category":"configuration","description":"autoPublish changed from true to false for stable release 20.0.0; should remain true to enable automatic NPM publishing"},{"file":"sdk/datafactory/arm-datafactory/review/arm-datafactory-node.api.md","line":744,"issueType":"design","category":"naming","description":"AzureClouds enum missing Known* prefix (should be KnownAzureClouds); members use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE instead of PascalCase"},{"file":"sdk/datafactory/arm-datafactory/review/arm-datafactory-node.api.md","line":1725,"issueType":"design","category":"type-safety","description":"AzureSupportedClouds uses closed template literal type `${AzureClouds}` instead of string, breaking forward compatibility"}]}
```

</details>
